prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热（2024年），该校对应专业（计算机、软件、电气、通信等）录取位次常年居前，推高整体竞争；石油工程、化工类等传统优势专业热度平稳；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，物理类按近年占比约71%估算约14.3万人，与2025年14.3万人基本持平，考生规模无显著变化；该校位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；辽宁省考生对省外211高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限，整体中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升后的高位基准、2026年计划小幅扩招（+2人）对竞争的缓解作用、考生规模持平、声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年14257名基础上略有后移（竞争略缓），预测最低位次约14423名，区间13923–14923名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14627 → 17169 → 17563 → 16606 → 14257, showing a 'backward then recovery' fluctuation: from 2021 to 2023, cumulative backward shift of about 2936 places; in 2024, a slight forward shift to 16606; in 2025, a significant forward shift to 14257 (2349 places forward from 2024), with a clear upward trend in the last two years, and 2025 being the lowest ranking in recent years (easiest to enter). The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning was 117 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 126 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 128, an increase of 2 from 2025, a small expansion of about 1.6%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (67th in 2025, 60th in 2024), with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally, with distinctive strengths in science and engineering. From 2021 to 2026, no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records were observed; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with average attention; overall reputation is stable, with no major events affecting application willingness. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is A+ (top nationally), Chemical Engineering and Technology is A, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering is A-, Safety Science and Engineering is A-, closely matching majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, and Safety Engineering, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular socially (2024), with corresponding majors at this university (Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Communication, etc.) consistently ranking high in admission rankings, raising overall competition. Traditional advantageous majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Liaoning Gaokao examinees is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,000 based on the recent proportion of about 71%, essentially unchanged from 2025's 143,000, with no significant change in candidate pool size. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference; Liaoning candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities is moderately affected by regional preferences, overall neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline after the significant ranking recovery in 2025, the slight easing effect of the small enrollment expansion (+2) in 2026, the stable candidate pool size, and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 14257 (competition slightly eases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 14423, and a range of 13923 to 14923.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3063 → 2889 → 1733 → 3165 → 2788, showing significant fluctuations: in 2023, it abnormally advanced to 1733 (only 3 students enrolled that year); in 2024, it greatly retreated to 3165; in 2025, it rebounded to 2788. The recent two years show a 'retreat-rebound' trend, with a baseline of about 2788 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 16 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a national top 100 science and engineering institution, but History Category is not its strength. No significant negative public opinion or abnormal filing records were observed in reputation monitoring; Douyin popularity is average; overall reputation is stable. The university's A-level disciplines are all in science and engineering (Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, etc.), while History Category majors (Russian, Accounting, Economics) have no directly corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Finance/Auditing social popularity is divided and wait-and-see (2024); Economics/Finance is divided and wait-and-see; Russian is a foreign language major with average wait-and-see. In 2026, Liaoning Province's History Category candidates, estimated at about 28.5% of total, are approximately 57,000, a slight increase of about 700 from 2025's 56,300, intensifying competition slightly. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local province university; History Category has few majors (only 3), limiting candidates' choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the 2025 ranking rebound, the unchanged 2026 plan, a slight increase in History Category candidates, and the limited appeal of a science-engineering university to liberal arts students, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to slightly retreat from the 2025 baseline of 2788 (due to slightly increased competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2808, with a range of 2308–3308.

- Economics (Shandong) (eligible to enter the Economic Management Experimental Class after enrollment).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2808, range 2308–3308. History Category has very few majors (only 3). Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (2308) can aim for Accounting and Economics; those around the middle of the range (approximately 2808) are advised to prioritize Accounting with Economics as a supplement; those near the upper limit (3308) should use Russian as a safety option.
